candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing/subtotal helper line, but less appropriate than the explicit total.
Not current assets; wrong section.
Non-current balancing line; not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Same concept with different capitalization; valid alternate across periods.

candidates.row_label: Cash at Hand and at Bank
candidates.why: Could represent cash balances, but less standard/preferred than explicit cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Closing balance of cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Opening balance of cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow statement opening cash, not the balance-sheet target.

final_choice.row_label: Cash at Hand and at Bank

variables.notes: Priority list reflects alternate row-label formulations used across years; all are balance-sheet cash lines.

candidates.why: Explicit total current/short-term liabilities line; best match for LCT.
Balancing line only; inferior to the explicit total.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the explicit reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct match for current financing debt; excludes trade payables and appears to capture short-term financial liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Also matches STD concept and explicitly excludes leases, but preview is blank and may be an alternate label across periods.
Direct shorthand for short-term debt; likely valid alternate label across periods.
Could denote current maturities, but wording is less standard and more ambiguous than the debt labels above.
Could include non-debt current financial liabilities; broader and more ambiguous.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Priority list of alternate STD labels across years. Each selected row is debt-focused and excludes lease rows. Do not sum across alternatives within the same year if more than one appears to describe the same balance.

candidates.why: Tax-related but non-current deferred taxes are not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: No clear current taxes payable/current tax liabilities row is present on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet line corresponding to property, plant and equipment / net tangible fixed assets.
Only a component/subcategory, not total PPE.
Component and gross basis, not preferred over total/net tangible assets.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated Depreciation of Property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE itself.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated Depreciation of Other tangible assets
candidates.why: Contra-asset for a component, not PPE total.

variables.notes: Used the total net tangible assets line as the best PPE proxy available.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.
Intermediate operating cash flow measure, often before interest/taxes; less preferred than the final operating cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating subtotal before working capital changes, not final OANCF.

variables.notes: Chose the final net operating cash flow line outside the shortlist because it is the clearest direct match.
